translation.text: The SR 520 Evergreen and Yarrow Point Freeway Station Platform Stops have Limited Accessibility for Ramp or Lift Deployment.

Affected routes:
255
982
986
ST 542
ST 545

Affected stops:
Stop #71348 SR 520 & Evergreen Point Rd (EB)
Stop #71359 Clyde Hill/Yarrow & Clyde Hill/Yarrow (EB)
Stop #71356 Clyde Hill/Yarrow & Clyde Hill/Yarrow (WB)
Stop #71355 SR 520 & Evergreen Point Rd (WB)

Effective now, and until further notice, this bus stop is inaccessible for customers requiring a ramp or lift on routes 255, 982 and 986 operating coach numbers 7200-7399, 6800-6899, and ST Express routes 542 and 545 operating coach numbers 9500-9659 due to safety concerns.

Alternative ramp and lift service is available at the following locations:

Routes 255 & 986 to Kirkland, the University District or Haller Lake: east of here at the South Kirkland Park and Ride.

Route 982 to Haller Lake or Bear Creek Park and Ride: east of here at the Redmond Technology Station.

The elevator at SR 520 & Evergreen Point Rd (WB) is out of service until further notice; Clyde Hill/Yarrow Point Freeway station elevators in both directions have resumed operation.

This is an update to the previous alert:

Westbound transit riders who require the use of an elevator can plan ahead to board or exit SR 520 transit service at the Clyde Hill/Yarrow Point Freeway Station instead. Transit passengers who need to get to Evergreen Point Station can transfer to eastbound routes 271 or ST 542 from the stop on NE Pacific St & Montlake Blvd NE - Bay 1 (EB) and use the elevator at the eastbound stop.

The Clyde Hill/Yarrow Point Freeway station elevators in both directions have resumed operation.
